steps.title: Calculate the cost of confetti
steps.content:
Sophia bought 10 packages of confetti at 3 dollars per package. Multiply to find the total cost:
$$10 \times 3 = 30$$
She spent 30 dollars on confetti.

steps.title: Find the number of balloons
steps.content:
She spent 56 dollars total and 30 dollars on confetti, so:
$$56 - 30 = 26$$
This is the amount left for balloons. Since each balloon costs 1 dollar, Sophia bought 26 balloons.
